codeReview.summary: Pass. Commit `48acf8b` closes both blockers from `browser-invite-recovery-surface`: `apps/dashboard/src/app/onboarding/page.tsx` now checks pending invites before rendering onboarding and redirects invite-bearing users to `/teams`, while the fix transcript shows the worker deleting ignored `.next/types`, regenerating them with `next typegen`, and succeeding on typed-route checks without any `.next/types/*` edits in the tracked diff.

summary: Reviewed the fix feature metadata, prior failed review, both handoffs, commit diffs `28a676b` and `48acf8b`, the fix transcript skeleton, the dashboard-parity-worker skill, and the current dashboard files. The fix adequately resolves the prior scrutiny blockers: pending-invite users are now gated away from direct `/onboarding` entry to `/teams`, no-invite users still fall through to onboarding, and `/teams` typed-route support is shown as reproducible from tracked source plus proper Next route-type regeneration rather than hand-edited ignored artifacts.
